info.name: Help PR — Combined modules (all collections)
info.description:
Single Postman collection from **five** sources: **duplicate API calls are merged** (same method + path template; `POST /api/getCount` also keyed by JSON `type`). Requests are grouped **by module** (Auth, State, City, …), not by original collection file.

**Merge priority (on conflict):**
1. `content-expense-expense-category-management.postman_collection (1).json`
2. `Help-PR-Admin-Dashboard.postman_collection.json`
3. `Help-PR-Area-Franchise-Subscription.postman_collection.json`
4. `Area-Management.postman_collection.json`
5. `Help-PR-Area-Franchise-Subscription-UserTypes.postman_collection.json`

**Variables:** union of all source collection variables.

item.name: POST getCount — my-franchise (Employees, Areas, Services, Categories)

request.description: Franchise admin card metrics. **Employees**: `total_employee`, `active_employee`, `inactive_employee`. **Areas**: `total_area`, `active_area`, `inactive_area`. **Categories**: `total_category`, `active_category`, `inactive_category`, `requested_category`. **Services**: `total_service`, `active_service`, `inactive_service`, `requested_service`. Pair list calls under **Categories** and **Services** folders (`GET .../getAll?status=...`) with these counts.

item.description: Source path: My Franchise → Summary cards (counts) → POST getCount — my-franchise (Employees, Areas, Services, Categories) (Help-PR-Admin-Dashboard.postman_collection.json)

item.name: Get all areas

query.description: Search: matches area name, state_name, linked city name, or any entry in pincodes (substring, case-insensitive). Same behavior as `areaname`.
Alias of `name` for the same unified search.
Additional filter: exact pincode in `pincodes` array.

request.description: **`name`** / **`areaname`**: one search string matches area **name**, **`state_name`**, linked **city name**, or any **pincode** in `pincodes`. Optional: **`city`**, **`state`**, **`pincode`** (exact array element), **`is_active`**, **`type=my-franchise`**, **`franchise_id`**, **`sort`**, **`sort_by`**, **`sort_order`** — see `area_service.listAreas`.

item.name: 08 — Franchise category
item.description: **/api/franchise-category** — deduplicated across source collections.

item.name: Franchise category — create
item.description: POST /api/franchise-category/create — super admin / staff only. Body: `franchise_id`, `categories_list` (`category_id`, `is_active`). Server sets `active_categories` / `inactive_categories` and **`categories_order`** (same order as entries in `categories_list`).

item.name: Franchise category — get by id
item.description: GET /api/franchise-category/get/:id — super / staff / franchise admin / employee (scoped). Response record includes `active_categories`, `inactive_categories`, `categories_order`, and **hydrated** `categories_list[].is_active` from `active_categories`.

item.name: Franchise category — getAll
item.description: GET /api/franchise-category/getAll — super / staff / franchise admin / employee. Query: `franchise_id`, `page`, `limit`, optional `is_active` / `is_request` (catalog doc filters). Each record: `active_categories`, `inactive_categories`, `categories_order`, plus **hydrated** `categories_list` for API display.

item.name: Franchise category — update
item.description:
PUT /api/franchise-category/update/:id.

**A — Partition toggle (default):** Body with **`active_categories`** and/or **`inactive_categories`** (ObjectId string arrays). They must **partition** every `category_id` in `categories_list`. **`categories_list` is not persisted** from this toggle. **Cascade:** any category moved to **inactive** forces services under that category (same franchise) from **`active_services`** → **`inactive_services`** on the mapping doc.

**B — Replace full list:** Super admin (or franchise admin under rules) may send **`categories_list`** — then `active_*` / `inactive_*` / **`categories_order`** are rebuilt from the payload.

**C — Reorder only:** **`categories_order`** alone (permutation of mapped ids). Responses hydrate `categories_list[].is_active` from `active_categories`.

item.name: 09 — Franchise service
item.description: **/api/franchise-service** — deduplicated across source collections.

item.name: Franchise service — create
item.description: POST /api/franchise-service/create — super admin / staff only. Body: `franchise_id`, `services_list` (`service_id`, `is_active`). Server sets `active_services` / `inactive_services` and **`services_order`** (same order as `services_list` entries).

item.name: Franchise service — get by id
item.description: GET /api/franchise-service/get/:id — same auth as getAll. Response hydrates `services_list[].is_active` from `active_services`.

item.name: Franchise service — getAll
item.description: GET /api/franchise-service/getAll — same roles as franchise category. Records include `active_services`, `inactive_services`, `services_order`, **hydrated** `services_list`.

item.name: Franchise service — update
item.description:
PUT /api/franchise-service/update/:id.

**Partition toggle:** `active_services` / `inactive_services` only — **`services_list` not persisted** from toggle (only when the full list is replaced). Send one or both arrays; complement derived. **No** parent-category cascade on service toggle.

**Reorder:** optional **`services_order`**. Responses hydrate `services_list[].is_active` from `active_services`.

item.name: 10 — Category (catalog)
item.description: **/api/category** — deduplicated across source collections.

item.name: Category — create
item.description: Source path: 04 — Service Management (catalog) → Category — create (Help-PR-Admin-Dashboard.postman_collection.json)

item.name: POST category — Add request (create-request)

request.description:
**Request body (JSON)** — `name`, `desc`, `image_url` (non-empty strings), `service_ids` (non-empty array of existing Service ObjectIds). Middleware sets `is_request=true`; controller sets `approval_status: "pending"`, `requested_by` = JWT user, `is_active` default false. Optional: `city_ids`, `state_ids` (arrays of ObjectId strings). Alternate: `multipart/form-data` with field `image` instead of `image_url` per `categoryCreateParser`.

**Response (200)** — `{ "success": true, "status": 200, "message": "Category created successfully.", "record": { ...Category document } }` with `is_request: true`, `approval_status: "pending"`.

**Response (409)** — duplicate name: `{ "success": false, "status": 409, "message": "Category name already exists." }`.

**Response (400)** — validation / invalid ObjectId in `service_ids` / cities / states.

response.name: 200 — category request created
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "message": "Category created successfully.",
  "record": {
    "_id": "64a700000000000000000001",
    "name": "Requested Category",
    "desc": "Description for approvers",
    "category_id": "CAT-00001",
    "image_url": "https://example.com/cat.png",
    "services": ["64a700000000000000000010"],
    "city_ids": [],
    "state_ids": [],
    "is_active": false,
    "is_request": true,
    "approval_status": "pending",
    "rejection_reason": null,
    "requested_by": "64a700000000000000000099"
  }
}

item.name: 11 — Service (catalog)
item.description: **/api/service** — deduplicated across source collections.

item.name: Create (direct — Super Admin / Staff)

request.description: Use token for type 5 or 6. Creates accepted service immediately. Alternatively use multipart/form-data with file field `image` instead of image_url.

item.description: Source path: Service → Create (direct — Super Admin / Staff) (Help-PR-Area-Franchise-Subscription.postman_collection.json)

item.name: POST service — Add request (create-request)

request.description:
**Request body (JSON)** — Required by `createServiceRequestMiddleware`: `name`, `desc`, `image_url`, `category_id` (existing Category ObjectId), `tax`, `commission`, `minimum_deposit` (non-negative numbers), `payment_type` (e.g. `per_hour`, `per_day`, `per_month`, `per_consultancy`). Optional: `price` (defaults 0), `city_ids`, `state_ids` (arrays). Route sets `is_request=true` → `approval_status: "pending"`, `requested_by` = JWT user, `is_active` false by default.

**Response (200)** — `{ "success": true, "status": 200, "message": "Service created successfully.", "record": { ...Service } }`.

**Response (400)** — missing required field messages from middleware or invalid ids.

Alternate: `multipart/form-data` with `image` file per `serviceCreateParser` (still send other fields as form text).

response.name: 200 — service request created
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "message": "Service created successfully.",
  "record": {
    "_id": "64a700000000000000000020",
    "name": "Requested Service",
    "desc": "Service description for approvers",
    "price": 0,
    "tax": 0,
    "commission": 0,
    "payment_type": "per_hour",
    "minimum_deposit": 0,
    "category_id": "64a700000000000000000001",
    "image_url": "https://example.com/svc.png",
    "is_active": false,
    "is_request": true,
    "approval_status": "pending",
    "requested_by": "64a700000000000000000099"
  }
}

item.name: 12 — User
item.description: **/api/user** — deduplicated across source collections. **Partners (`type` 2)**: folder **Partner (type 2)** — create (**multipart**: **`partner_services`** or **`partner-services`**, optional **`date_of_birth`**, **`experience`**), list **`getAll?type=2&is_verified=`** (`pending` / `approved` / `rejected`), get/update/delete, change password; **Register partner (public)** is mobile self-signup (no JWT). **Get partner dropdown** and **Get verification all** below.

item.name: Partner (type 2)
item.description: Partner CRUD uses **`/api/user`**. **`partner_services`** on create/update (update = full replace when sent). **`PUT .../update/:id`**: profile, **`password`** + **`confirm_password`**, **`is_verified`**, verification files + **`partner_documents`**, **`bank_account`**, **`partner_subscription`**, **`partner_services`**. Use **`GET .../get/:id`** after save.

item.name: Create partner (web)

formdata.description: Optional; not stored on user model (sent for parity with dashboard).
Ignored for **`type` 2** create — API always saves **`is_active`: false** until approval.
Optional ISO date string; sent in **`multipart`** so **`req.body.date_of_birth`** is set (disable row to omit).
Optional string; sent in **`multipart`** so **`req.body.experience`** is set (disable row to omit).
Relative or absolute URL; overridden when **image** file is attached.
Not read by API.

JSON array: [{ category_id, is_active, services: [{ service_id, is_active, description, price, tax, payment_type, minimum_deposit }] }]. category is_active → partner_category; service is_active → partner_service.
Alternate form-data key (hyphen). Enable only when **`partner_services`** is cleared — middleware merges into **`partner_services`**.
Ignored on create — partner is always created pending; use **`PUT .../update/:id`** with **`is_verified`**: **`approved`** / **`rejected`**.
Alternate path: enable and clear **partner_services** (and **partner-services**). JSON array or single ObjectId string per field.
Alternate path (with **category_ids**); must use distinct real service OIDs.

Verification file (image or PDF). Path stored on **`partner_document.document_image`**. Requires a matching active **Document** row; **`name`** may be spaced or underscored (e.g. **`vehicle registration`** / **`vehicle_registration`**).
Same as **`vehicle_registration`**: file → upload path → **`partner_document.document_image`** when **Document.name** matches (slug or spaced).
Same as **`vehicle_registration`**: file → **`document_image`** via **Document** name match.
Same as **`vehicle_registration`**: file → **`document_image`** via **Document** name match.
Same as **`vehicle_registration`**: file → **`document_image`** via **Document** name match.

Optional JSON string: keys = same slugs as file fields; values = URL/path strings. Merged with uploads; persisted on **`partner_document.document_image`** (not on user). **`{}`** is fine when using file fields only.
**is_active** on bank JSON is ignored by API (not on bank model).

JSON string. **`status`** must be string **`active`**, **`expired`**, or **`cancelled`** (not numeric). Legacy **`1`** is accepted server-side as **`active`**. **`subscription_start_date`** / **`subscription_end_date`** (or **`started_at`** / **`expires_at`**) set the window. Enable when **`{{id}}`** is a real plan. Top-level form keys may be used if **`partner_subscription`** is omitted.
Optional profile image; overrides **profile_url** when set.

request.description: **`POST /api/user/create`** — **`multipart/form-data`** (or JSON without files). Partners: **`partner_services`** or **`partner-services`**, parallel **`category_ids`** / **`service_ids`** (JSON arrays or single ObjectId string), **`bank_account`** (JSON string; include **`is_primary`: true** so **`GET .../get/:id`** returns **`bank_account`**), optional **`date_of_birth`**, **`experience`**, **`partner_subscription`** (JSON: **`subscription_plan_id`**, **`subscription_start_date`**, **`subscription_end_date`**, or **`started_at`** / **`expires_at`**), verification file fields + **`partner_documents`**, **`image`**, **`profile_url`**. **`type` 2**: always **`verification_status` 1** + **`is_active` false**; **`is_verified`** in body is ignored. **200** **`record`** omits partner **`documents`** — call **`GET /api/user/get/:id`** for **`documents`** / **`document_image`**. Do not set **`Content-Type`** manually for multipart.

item.description: Web/admin partner create — dashboard-shaped **form-data**; see request description for catalog and **`partner_services`** key.

item.name: Get all partners

query.description: Super admin / staff only; franchise admin cannot pass this.

request.description: With **`type=2`**, omit **`is_verified`** → only **`verification_status` 2** (approved) partners. Use **`is_verified=pending`** / **`rejected`** for verification queues. Response rows include **`is_verified`** string and **`date_of_birth`** / **`experience`** when set. Partner (2) and user (4) callers get **403**.

item.description: Paginated partner list for back office.

item.name: Get partner by id

request.description: **`GET /api/user/get/:id`**. For **`type`**: **2**, response includes **`documents`**, **`bank_account`**, **`date_of_birth`**, **`experience`**, service aggregates, and business fields when applicable. For **`type`**: **4**, includes **`date_of_birth`** on the user record.

item.description: Fetch one partner; set **`partnerId`** first.

item.name: Update partner

formdata.description: Optional ISO date. Disable row to omit.
Optional string. Disable row to omit.
Optional: male | female | other
Partner user account active flag (not catalog is_active).
Optional; must send confirm_password with same value when enabled.
Required when password is sent; must match password.
JSON string; upserts partner primary bank account.
JSON string; assigns new plan (cancels prior active subscription). status: active | expired | cancelled.
Ignored when image file is attached.
Optional profile image.
approved | rejected | pending — maps to verification_status.
Use when is_verified is rejected.

JSON array. Replaces full partner catalog. category is_active → partner_category.is_active; service is_active → partner_service.is_active. Use distinct category_id / service_id per row (duplicate IDs collapse to one DB row). Omit this field to leave catalog unchanged.
Optional JSON map of document slug → URL/path; merged with file uploads.

request.description:
**PUT /api/user/update/:id** (partner). **multipart/form-data** or JSON.

**Profile:** name, email, phone_number, address, state_id, city_id, area_id, pincode, profile_url, image, date_of_birth, experience, gender, is_active, is_blocked, is_business, chat, franchise_id.

**Password:** password + confirm_password (both required together).

**Verification:** is_verified, verification_rejection_reason; partner_documents JSON; files: vehicle_registration, police_verification_certificate, pan_card, driving_license, aadhar_card (seeds missing doc rows from master catalog, then updates images).

**Catalog:** partner_services JSON — full replace when sent.

**Bank:** bank_account JSON — upsert primary account.

**Subscription:** partner_subscription JSON — new assignment (same as create). Use GET /api/user/get/:id after update.

item.description: Update partner profile, verification, and/or full service catalog (partner_services).

request.description: **`DELETE /api/user/delete/:id`** — sets **`deleted_at`** (soft delete).

item.description: Soft-delete partner user document.

request.description: **`type`** must be **2** (partner) or **4** (end user). **`user_id`** is the user's **`_id`**.

item.description: Reset partner password; set **`partnerId`** first.

item.name: Change password

request.description: **`type`**: **2** (partner) or **4** (end user) only. Sample body uses **`type`: 4**; for partners use **`type`: 2** and **`user_id`**: **`{{partnerId}}`** (see **Partner (type 2) → Change password (partner)**).

item.name: Create user

request.description: **`POST /api/user/create`** — Bearer required. JSON body when **`Content-Type: application/json`** (no multipart). For **`type` 4** (customer), optional **`date_of_birth`** (ISO string). For **`type` 2** use **Partner (type 2) → Create partner (web)** (**multipart**). Franchise admin (1) / employee (3): only partner (2), employee (3), user (4); **`franchise_id`** forced for partner/employee when omitted.

item.name: 36 — Offer
item.description:
**/api/offer** — Offers management (Settings).

- **IDs:** `_id` (path param) + `unique_id` on create (e.g. OFF1001).
- **Types:** `percentage` (amounts below 100) or `fixed`.
- **getAll:** `page`, `limit`, `name` (search name + unique_id), `status` (active|inactive), `start_date`, `end_date`, `sort_by` (name|value), `sort_order`, optional `type`, `is_active`.

request.description: Create offer. Response `record.unique_id` is auto-generated (e.g. OFF1001). For `type: percentage`, value/admin_contribution/partner_contribution must each be below 100.

query.description: Search offer name or unique_id (OFF1001), partial case-insensitive
Only start_date: offers from this date onward. With end_date: range filter.
Only end_date: offers until this date. With start_date: range filter.

request.description:
Paginated list.

**Search (`name`):** matches `name` or `unique_id`.

**Status:** `status=active` | `inactive`.

**Dates:** start only → from date; end only → until date; both → between.

**Sort:** `sort_by` + `sort_order`.
Get offer by MongoDB `_id` ({{offer_id}}). Response includes `unique_id` (e.g. {{offer_unique_id}}).
Update offer by _id.
Soft-delete offer.

variable.description: Optional for quote-management getCount and GET /api/quote/getCounts
Set by State → Create for City → Import cities.
User _id used as franchise admin_id on create/import (must exist).
Set by User → Create user on success.
Partner user **`_id`**. Set by **12 — User → Partner (type 2) → Create partner (web)** or **Register partner (public)** test scripts on success.
Optional; Mongo _id of creator for web onboarding flows.
Generic MongoDB _id: franchise GET/update/delete, subscription-plan, offer, imports, etc. For mapping docs prefer franchise_category_mapping_id / franchise_service_mapping_id.
24-hex Mongo **_id** of a category (for **partner_services** / parallel arrays on partner create).
24-hex Mongo **_id** of a service under that category (for **partner_services** / parallel arrays).
API root with protocol, no trailing slash (e.g. http://localhost:5001).
JWT / bearer token from /api/auth/userLogin or /api/auth/login. Prefer storing only in an Environment as type secret.
`franchise_category` collection document _id (from getAll). Used in /api/franchise-category/get/:id and .../update/:id.
`franchise_service` collection document _id (from getAll). Used in /api/franchise-service/get/:id and .../update/:id.
State document _id (for request bodies linking to state).
Franchise document _id. Used in franchise create side-effects, franchise-category / franchise-service bodies, GET /api/franchise/related-catalog/{{franchise_id}}, and getAll query filters.
Admin user _id (audit / created_by fields if applicable).
Offer MongoDB _id (24 hex). Set by Offer — create test script. Used in get/update/delete paths.
Business offer id from create response (e.g. OFF1001). Read-only; shown in list/get records.
Search text for GET /api/offer/getAll query param name (matches offer name or unique_id e.g. OFF1001).
GET /api/offer/getAll — status filter: active, inactive, or empty for all.
GET /api/offer/getAll — filter start_date (YYYY-MM-DD). Alone: offers from this date onward.
GET /api/offer/getAll — filter end_date (YYYY-MM-DD). Alone: offers until this date.
Optional; enable in Get all — filters request.
